codex_response:
Rule: swap `0` with the only other color in the input, then tile the swapped grid in a 2x2 arrangement. I used the summary hint because it matched the official examples exactly. The generator matches the family by sampling small square `2x2` to `4x4` two-color inputs with `0` plus one nonzero color and moderate occupancy, then deriving the output by the same swap-and-tile rule. No new primitive was needed.
